title: Skill Golden Task Eval Set
description: Schema for .github/skills/<skill>/evals/*.yaml golden task files used by sdlc skill-eval (ADR-0006 / ADR-025).

version.description: Eval set version (semver or date string, e.g. '1.0.0' or '2026-05-29').

description.description: Human-readable description of what this eval set covers.

blast_radius_cap.description: Max number of sections a skill-propose may change before being rejected. Default: 3 (LEAN threshold).

id.description: Unique task identifier within this eval set (e.g. 'T01').

input.description: Synthetic input fed to the skill (the user request / history text).

expected_fields.description: List of field names or substrings that MUST appear in the skill output. Deterministic check (presence-based). All must be present for the task to pass.

expected_absent.description: Strings that must NOT appear in the skill output (anti-patterns / regression guards).

rubric.description: Optional LLM-assisted rubric for scoring (used only if deterministic check is insufficient). NOT evaluated in P4 pilot; reserved for P4+.

weight.description: Relative weight for score computation. Default: 1 (all tasks equal).
